name: Dried Cherry Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Beat together butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the egg and vanilla.
4. In a bowl, combine flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg; add to creamed butter mixture, mixing well.
5. Stir in oatmeal and dried cherries.
6. Drop by a rounded tablespoon onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake 8 to 11 minutes or until lightly golden.
8. Cool one minute on the cookie sheet, then remove.
